text.title: QBR Deck Template Services Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed across deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Client re-orients each quarter; engagement scores drop.
antipattern.root-cause: PM ships custom slide order each quarter.
antipattern.fix: Enforce fixed 10-slide shape; deviations require sign-off.

antipattern.symptom: Client disputes 'we increased X 20%'; PM cannot point to the source.
antipattern.root-cause: Claims not anchored to evidence URL or ticket ID.
antipattern.fix: Every claim links to dashboard / ticket / transcript timestamp.

antipattern.symptom: Deck reads as 'hours billed' recap; client perceives the relationship as transactional.
antipattern.fix: Lead with outcome review vs prior-quarter plan (delta + root cause + next move).

antipattern.symptom: QBR ends without scheduling next intro / reference / scope conversation.
antipattern.fix: Mandatory Asks slide with 1-3 explicit asks per QBR.
